detail.instructions: Keep the Config, ConfigError, and validate behavior from earlier lessons. Change first_valid_config so it takes configs: &[Config] and returns Option<&Config> borrowed from the candidate slice.

hints.body: The function only needs to read candidate configs and call validate on each one.
Returning &Config lets startup keep ownership of all candidates while the caller inspects the selected one.
iter().find(...) can return the borrowed Config from the slice.

detail.completionExplanation: Borrowing keeps startup selection lightweight. The caller keeps ownership of every Config candidate, and the selected Config is a reference into the existing slice.
